Management: "Double-digit growth 초과, AI orders $2B 폭증, dividend 2% 인상 $0.42, RPO $43.4억 (+5%)" 강조. Gross margin 67.5% (non-GAAP), operating margin 34.6% 상회.

Stock reaction: after-hours 7% 하락 (AI 수요 강세에도 gross margin 우려).
